summary: Tested revamped Driver Portal with 3 tabs (Deliveries, Pick Ups, Completed). All 8 core tests passed. UI correctly implements all required changes: 3-tab navigation works, Deliveries tab shows out_for_delivery orders with Scan Delivery + Complete POD buttons (NO pickup scan), Pick Ups tab ready for new orders, Completed tab shows today's completed deliveries, Online/Offline toggle replaces old status buttons, Rating removed from profile.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

frontend: 3 Tab Navigation: Deliveries, Pick Ups, Completed tabs visible and clickable
Deliveries tab shows only out_for_delivery/in_transit/assigned orders (4 orders found)
Deliveries tab cards have 'Scan Delivery' and 'Complete POD' buttons (4 each)
Deliveries tab does NOT have 'Scan for Pickup' buttons (correct!)
Pick Ups tab shows 'No pickups pending' message (0 pending pickups as expected)
Completed tab shows 'No completed deliveries today' (correct empty state)
Online/Offline toggle button works - toggled from Online to Offline successfully
No rating/stars visible in driver profile (removed as required)
No 'Available'/'On Break' status buttons (removed as required, replaced with single toggle)
Delivery Details Modal shows correct buttons: Scan for Delivery, Complete Delivery (POD), Navigate
Delivery Details Modal does NOT show 'Scan for Pickup' for out_for_delivery orders
QR Scanner opens with 'Delivery' badge when scanning for delivery

critical_code_review_comments: Tab filtering logic correct: Deliveries shows out_for_delivery/in_transit/assigned, Pick Ups shows new/pending/confirmed/ready_for_pickup, Completed shows today's delivered orders
Online/Offline toggle uses proper API call (driverPortalAPI.updateStatus)
Minor accessibility improvement: Add aria-describedby to Dialog components to resolve console warnings
context_for_next_testing_agent: Driver Portal revamped successfully. Currently shows 4 deliveries pending (out_for_delivery status), 0 pickups, 0 completed today. Driver profile 'Mike Driver' with 2 total deliveries. All 3 tabs working correctly. Modal buttons display correct actions based on order status.

features_tested.deliveries_buttons_scan_delivery_complet: WORKING - Both buttons on each card
features_tested.completed_tab_today_only: WORKING - Shows empty state (0 completed today)
